reason: Rebuild Egypt VAT on one reviewed engine across English, French, Swahili and the widget. The engine applies the 14% standard rate for add and extract calculations, keeps confirmed zero-rated, exempt and other schedule-based treatment distinct, and treats custom rates as non-statutory scenarios. Its registration screen uses the general EGP500,000 preceding-12-month boundary while explicitly excluding importer, exporter, distribution-agent and other special cases. Proposed amendments, generic 5% treatment and product-name classification are excluded until enacted, published, effective and tied to an exact law or schedule entry. No protected golden fixture existed, so the route and engine digest changes have no carried result delta.
